steps.title: Identify the subject that must agree with the verb
steps.content: The subject is the toxins that the organism uses to protect itself. Though a relative clause modifies this noun, the core subject remains plural—it refers to multiple toxins.

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement
steps.content: Subject-verb agreement requires a plural subject to take a plural verb form. Increase is plural and agrees with toxins; the other choices are all singular verb forms that violate this rule. That matches Choice B — increase.
